last_item: Band-1.5: test-lock the local-only 'move backups off-host' nudge — extract backupDestination + LocalBackupWarning from Backups.tsx and cover with vitest/RTL
last_result: done — the off-host S3 nudge already shipped (Backups badge + warn Callout linking to Settings; Settings 'recommended for off-server protection' copy + local-only warning) but the local-vs-S3 destination logic was inline in Backups.tsx with ZERO test coverage, so a refactor could silently drop the panel's primary push toward durable off-server backups. Closed the acceptance 'covered by a test' gap: extracted exported pure backupDestination(backup, loaded) returning a loading|local|s3 discriminated union (mirroring the backupFreshness precedent) and lifted the local-only warning JSX into an exported LocalBackupWarning component. Behavior preserved exactly — the union replaces the prior boolean|undefined isLocal + parallel bucketName bindings. Added 9 vitest/RTL tests: backupDestination across loading/local/whitespace-only/bucket/endpoint-only/bucket-preferred, and LocalBackupWarning asserting the warn-tone callout + /settings link fire only when local (renders nothing for s3/loading). Reviewed (feature-dev:code-reviewer): no blocking issues; applied both cleanups — documented the deliberate .trim() divergence from the server's untrimmed remoteTargetConfigured (Settings trims on save → belt-and-suspenders for a hand-edited DB value), and dropped the redundant bucketName local in favor of reading the narrowed union directly. Web typecheck/test (24 total)/build + full Go gate green.
notes: Band 1.5 (data durability) IN PROGRESS. Done: (1) 'last good backup was N ago' surfaced (Dashboard + Backups banner). (2) backup-failed/backup-stale rules + metrics + Collector.enrichBackup. (3) telemetry+alert evaluation LOOP wired (background.go) — alerts fire in prod. (4) ***SCHEDULED BACKUPS NOW RUN: full+incremental cron jobs registered in startBackgroundJobs; Manager.backupMu single-flight guard makes overlaps a CodeConflict skip (no fail row, no false alert).*** (5) off-host S3 nudge test-locked: backupDestination + LocalBackupWarning extracted from Backups.tsx + vitest/RTL covered. Remaining 1.5: restore-test SURFACING + EXECUTION (handleRestoreTest is still a stub returning typed 'not implemented' — wiring its execution is separate from this — likely next top 1.5 item); optionally wire OTLP exporter (nil in the collector). Plumbing: alert engine reads Snapshot FIELDS via alert/metrics.go metricValue (separate key namespace from telemetry/snapshot.go MetricKeys). Backups: internal/backup/manager.go Backup() takes backupMu.TryLock first, then ownership, writes terminal 'fail'/'success'; internal/store/backup.go (ListBackups newest-first, LatestSuccessfulBackup). Scheduler: internal/scheduler — empty spec disables (Register no-op); Jobs() lists registered. go/psql/pg_ctl snap-sandboxed (run sandbox-disabled). TMPDIR empty in some shells — use /tmp.
north_star: An indie hacker can stand up and run a rock-solid Postgres entirely from the indiepg UI, on best defaults, with safe optional overrides.
